landing.heroDescription: Tell our AI agents what you want to build. They'll plan the architecture, write the code, review it, and deliver a working application — all in real time.
landing.feature1Desc: Planner, Coder, and Reviewer agents work together to deliver quality code through structured workflows.
landing.feature2Desc: Watch as agents think, plan, and write code in real time with streaming responses.
landing.feature3Desc: See your application come to life instantly in a sandboxed preview as code is generated.

login.signUpDesc: Sign up to start building with AI

dashboard.heroTitle: What do you want to create today?
dashboard.heroSubtitle: Describe your needs, AI agents will plan, code and review for you
dashboard.inputPlaceholder: Describe the app you want to build...
dashboard.noProjectsDesc: Create your first project to get started

templates.landingPageDesc: Modern landing page with hero, features grid, testimonials, and CTA
templates.todoAppDesc: Tasks with complete/delete, filters, count display
templates.dashboardDesc: Analytics with stat cards, line chart, orders table
templates.productPageDesc: E-commerce with image gallery, price, selectors, reviews
